user.title: Solar Buddy – Energy sensors
user.description: Point Solar Buddy at your current solar production and your house's base consumption. The house consumption sensor must NOT include the EV charger or other loads Solar Buddy controls.

data_description.solar_production_entity: Current power in W or kW (not an accumulated kWh energy sensor).
data_description.house_consumption_entity: Current power in W or kW, excluding EV charging and battery flows.

battery.title: Solar Buddy – House battery
battery.description: Do you have a house battery Solar Buddy should take into account?

battery_details.title: Solar Buddy – Battery details
battery_details.description: Select battery entities. Charging status and charge limit are optional; read-only entities are used for monitoring only.

battery_signed.title: Solar Buddy – Battery power (one sensor)
battery_signed.description: One sensor with positive and negative values. Inverter brands disagree on what the sign means, so please tell Solar Buddy.

battery_separate.title: Solar Buddy – Battery power (two sensors)
battery_separate.description: Separate charge and discharge power sensors (W or kW).

ev.title: Solar Buddy – EV charger
ev.description: Do you have an EV charger Solar Buddy should manage or monitor?

ev_control.title: Solar Buddy – Charger control
ev_control.description: How is charging started and stopped?

ev_switch.title: Solar Buddy – Charger switch
ev_switch.description: The switch that starts and stops charging.

ev_start_stop.title: Solar Buddy – Start and stop entities
ev_start_stop.description: Separate entities that start and stop charging (button, script or switch).

ev_details.title: Solar Buddy – EV details
ev_details.description: Charging current control, cable status and EV state of charge. All fields are optional but enable more functionality.

data.ev_min_soc_entity: Minimum EV state of charge (sensor or number, %)

data_description.ev_connected_states: Case-insensitive. Only used when the cable status entity is a regular sensor.
data_description.ev_min_soc_entity: When the EV is below this level, charging is prioritized — in price-aware strategies also from the grid during cheap hours.

price.title: Solar Buddy – Electricity price
price.description: Optional: an electricity price sensor, e.g. from Energi Data Service. Without it, Solar Buddy runs in pure solar mode.

error.same_entity: The same entity cannot be used for both fields.
error.not_a_power_sensor: This entity does not look like a power sensor (W/kW).
error.energy_sensor_selected: This is an accumulated energy sensor (kWh). Select a power sensor (W/kW) instead.
error.not_a_percentage: This entity does not look like a percentage sensor.
error.price_entity_invalid: This entity does not have a numeric price state.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Solar Buddy is already configured. Use Reconfigure to change it.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The Solar Buddy configuration was updated.

data.ev_allowed_days: Days where EV charging is allowed
data.export_price_threshold: Block export at or below this price

error.min_above_max: Minimum current cannot be higher than maximum current.
error.cheap_above_expensive: The cheap percentile must be lower than the expensive percentile.
error.invalid_phases: The number of phases must be 1 or 3.
error.invalid_voltage: The voltage must be between 100 and 400 V.
error.no_days_selected: Select at least one day where charging is allowed.

options.signed: One sensor with positive and negative values

state.data_not_ready: No recommendation: sensor data is not ready
state.no_ev_configured: Monitoring energy flow (no EV charger configured)
state.ev_not_connected: EV charging paused: the car is not connected
state.ev_target_reached: EV charging done: target state of charge reached
state.ev_charge_recommended: EV charging recommended from solar surplus
state.grid_charge_cheap: Grid charging recommended: EV below minimum during cheap prices
state.grid_charge_planned: Grid charging in a planned cheap window before departure
state.grid_charge_deadline: Grid charging now: the required level must be reached before departure
state.ev_blocked_expensive: EV charging avoided: electricity is expensive
state.surplus_below_minimum: Solar surplus below the minimum charging power
state.ev_blocked_schedule: EV charging blocked: outside the allowed days/time window
